title: デビュー戦の後に・姫の第一歩

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My debut race is complete! By building
experience and getting used to racing, I'm on a
direct route to becoming my ideal princess!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and then after the race, I'm requested to
have an interview too! I'm so fired up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure when my next race will be, but I'll be
working on building up my fan base in the
meantime! Princess☆Stomp! Haaah!
